# 新闻速递 2026-03-22

## Tencent
- 因中美伊局势紧张，腾讯旗下微信等中国社媒平台反美言论激增并主导热搜，提升了用户活跃度，但增加了内容审查压力。（[Scmp](https://www.scmp.com/news/china/diplomacy/article/3347475/chinese-social-media-awash-criticisms-us-it-possible-go-too-far?utm_source=rss_feed)）

## AppLovin
- Signet Financial Management LLC增加了对AppLovin公司的持股，显示市场对该公司未来前景的信心增强。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=2)）

---

## Source Appendix

- [Chinese social media is awash with criticisms of the US, but is it possible to go too far?](https://www.scmp.com/news/china/diplomacy/article/3347475/chinese-social-media-awash-criticisms-us-it-possible-go-too-far?utm_source=rss_feed) — Scmp `Tencent`
- [Signet Financial Management LLC Increases Stake in AppLovin Corporation $APP - MarketBeat](https://news.google.?oc=5) — News.google `AppLovin`
